title: KillsPlugin
description: Small plugin for kills count placeholder and leaderboard
body:
Small plugin that adds placeholder for kill count and leaderboard, with an ability to reset it

/resetkills - reset kills of all players 
/topkiller - show top 1 killer on the server

permissions: 
killsplugin.reset - rights to reset kills

placeholder: 
%kills_count% - placeholder to show kill count of a player
